page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool with multiple functions. Main functions are to create a DIAMOND database from the GTDB taxonomy data or create a NCBI taxdump format out of this data. This tool can also create a mapping between the taxonomy classification between GTDB and NCBI.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Convert GTDB taxonomy to NCBI taxdump format
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Tool with multiple functions. Main functions are to create a DIAMOND database from the GTDB taxonomy data or create a NCBI taxdump format out of this data. This tool can also create a mapping between the taxonomy classification between GTDB and NCBI.
